_comment: The ONLY file the autoresearch agent edits. Search space = the edit band (which transformer layers to write into) + mom2_update_weight. Hypothesis (CORPUS/20 / C2b): same-relation key collinearity is minimal at L8-12, so editing there should reduce SEQUENTIAL cross-entity corruption vs the [4-8] baseline. Start at the C2b sweet spot; the agent may explore neighbouring bands.
